nasb.text: Lamech took to himself two wives: the name of the one was Adah, and the name of the other, Zillah.

esv.text: And Lamech took two wives. The name of the one was Adah, and the name of the other Zillah.

cnv.text: 拉麥娶了兩個妻子，一個名叫亞大，另一個名叫洗拉。

ccb.text: 拉麦娶了两个妻子，一个叫亚大，另一个叫洗拉。

csbs.text: 拉麦为自己娶了两个妻子：一个名叫娅达，另一个名叫茜拉。
